name: codex-screenshot-query
description: macOS menu bar helper for screenshot-driven Codex prompts.
author: bytedance

scripts.dev: npm run build:main && concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.package:dmg: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg --publish never -c.mac.identity=null -c.mac.notarize=false
scripts.package:dmg:signed: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg --publish never
scripts.check:mac-signing: security find-identity -v -p codesigning | grep 'Developer ID Application' && xcrun notarytool --version
